CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-08-2010 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 503. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-25-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-26-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA FRANCHISE TAX BOARD DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-26-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-11-2010

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-14-2010 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR, UNTIMELY PURSUANT TO CCP 1005(B). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STIPULATED APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME TO HEAR PLTF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-25-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON APR-25-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN 206 (PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED 07-22-10)
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-08-2010 AT 2:00 P.M. IN DEPT. 503 CONTINUED TO MAR-30-2011 AT 3:00 PM IN 501
ORDER CONTINUING TRIAL DATE.
NOTICE OF RESCHEDULED EARLY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE - EARLY SETTLEMENT PROGRAM

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (UNOPPOSED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-19-2010 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BYRON SUN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/25/11 AND THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 3/30/11 TO BE VACATED. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THE CASE BACK TO CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF 4/29/11 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR COMPLEX DISCOVERY ISSUES OUT OF THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT MUST BE MADE. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR ON APR-25-2011. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON APR-29-2011 AT 9:00 AM FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE MCBRIDE HAS ORDERED THE CASE BACK TO CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR COMPLEX DISCOVERY ISSUES OUT OF THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT MUST BE MADE, PER RULING OF 10/19/10. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)
NOTICE OF RESCHEDULED EARLY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE - EARLY SETTLEMENT PROGRAM
ORDER GRANTING IN PART PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO 10/24/11
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERCAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
NOTICE OF REMOVAL FROM THE EARLY SETTLEMENT PROGRAM
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-30-2011 - DISMISSAL ON FILE.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-29-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
